candidates.why: Explicit total revenue/sales line; identical to Net sales and suitable as a fallback label.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; depreciation component within COGS.
COGS, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Loss from sales of fixed assets
candidates.why: Non-operating gain/loss item, not revenue.
Primary top-line sales row; best match for revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list to handle possible label variation across years; Net sales is preferred, with Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label, but it appears more than once in the sheet including a likely component/subline, creating ambiguity.
Explicit consolidated COGS/cost of revenues line; cleanest unambiguous reported COGS row.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not income-statement COGS expense.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Depreciation subcomponent of COGS, not total COGS.
Balancing row; should not be preferred over explicit reported COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total COGS row to avoid ambiguity from duplicate Cost of goods sold labels.

candidates.why: Overhead/other operating expense bucket; acceptable SG&A component.
Looks like same concept but preview is empty; less preferable than populated variant.
Core SG&A component; explicit selling overhead.
Amortization subcomponent; excluded by SG&A rules.
Core SG&A component; explicit administrative overhead.
Amortization subcomponent; excluded by SG&A rules.
Alternative admin-type overhead row, but likely a balancing/derived row and less preferable than explicit Administrative expenses.
Balance sheet liability, not an income-statement SG&A expense row.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row is present. Selected the best overhead component rows and excluded amortization subcomponents and subtotals.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Depreciation subcomponent within R&D, not the main R&D expense line.
Amortization subcomponent and appears empty.
Supplemental capitalized amount, not the primary expensed R&D line.
Supplemental line; less preferable than the explicit primary R&D expense row.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Explicit R&D expense line is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense component for leases, but not total interest expense.
Explicit interest expense line; preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred over primary interest expense.
Balancing row, not preferred.

variables.notes: Interest Expense is the preferred line for years where reported. In 2025 the statement appears to present only Net financial items instead of a separate interest expense line, so a fallback outside the candidate list was added. Manual review is needed because Net financial items may include non-interest finance components. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net financial items

candidates.why: Best book equity choice here because it excludes the separately reported Non-controlling interest; Total equity plus Non-controlling interest equals Equity.
Includes non-controlling interest here, so using it for BE would double count with MIB.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected Total equity because it excludes the separately reported Non-controlling interest, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet minority interest.
Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority interest.
Explicit balance sheet minority interest / NCI line; best match.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet NCI line, consistent with BE exclusion of minority interest.
